title: Tevlaphee Upgraded Steering Wheel Lock, Seat Belt Lock, Metal Head, High Visibility Car Lock Anti-Theft Device, Heavy Duty, Universal Fit for Car, SUV, Pickup, Jeep, Van, RV, 3Keys(Yellow)
features: 🔐 【UPGRADED ALUMINUM LOCK HEAD】Made with reinforced aluminum alloy instead of plastic. Stronger and more durable, offering superior resistance against prying, tampering, and break-ins.
🔐 【DOUBLE ANTI-THEFT PROTECTION】Locks both the steering wheel and the seat belt socket at the same time. Provides double-layer security that outperforms ordinary steering wheel locks.
🔐 【THICKENED STEEL CABLE】High-performance braided steel cable, saw-proof and shear-resistant. Wrapped in a protective nylon sheath to prevent scratches on your steering wheel.
🔐 【HIGH VISIBILITY DETERRENT】Brightly colored exterior makes the lock highly visible, deterring thieves even at night. A strong visual warning that your vehicle is well protected.
🔐 【COMPACT & EASY TO STORE】Lightweight design takes up minimal space. Easily stored in your car’s glove box, door pocket, or storage compartment when not in use.
description: Product Description Tevlaphee Upgraded Steering Wheel Lock – Double Anti-Theft Protection Our UPGRADED STEERING WHEEL LOCK secures both the steering wheel and seat belt, providing double anti-theft protection. Lightweight and compact, it fits most vehicles and is easy to install and store, giving you peace of mind wherever you go. Aluminum Alloy Lock Head – Stronger and More Durable than Plastic The reinforced aluminum alloy lock head is stronger and more durable than plastic locks. Resistant to prying and tampering, it provides long-lasting protection while preventing the common weakness of plastic heads, which can be easily broken or bypassed. Previous page THICKEND STEEL CABLE, STRONG ANTI-THEFT The thick braided steel cable has excellent resistance to cutting and sawing, keeping your car safe! HIGH SAFETY FACTOR Tevlaphee team collected customer needs and developed this new and upgraded steering wheel lock, which locks the steering wheel and seat belt socket at the same time, you can use it with confidence! Next page REINFORCED LOCK CORE Upgraded lock core with complex design and double-sided, double-row key. Hard to pick, low chance of duplicate key openings. NO SCRATCH Wrapped with PVC. It can prevent wear and tear on the steering wheel. GOOD WORKMANSHIP Fine edge stitching, tight lines, and long service life. NYLON COVER The nylon cover is brightly colored and can be easily noticed by people outside the car. VISUAL DETERRENT The outermost layer is wrapped in nylon cover with bright color, which is bright enough to be seen at night to warn thieves to stay away from your car! EASY TO STORE Our steering wheel lock is easily rolled up and stored in the glove box, seat pocket, driver's door storage box, or center console. It won't take up too much space in your car. Previous page Rotate about 30° clockwise. Press the key down. Pull the lock out of the seat belt socket. The MAX usage length is 22 " . Compatible with most vehicles on the market.
